title: Service Engineer (Access Control System)
description:
• MNC Company
  • Basic $2700 - $3200 + Allowance + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression
  • Working location: West / On-site
  • Working hours: Monday to Friday (8.30am to 5.30pm)


Job Responsibilities:


Commissioning at Customer Premises

  • Attend site commissioning sessions with customers and contractors.
  • Conduct end-user training on the operation and maintenance of Intruder Alarm, CCTV and Access control systems.
  • Inspect and verify contractor’s installation work to ensure it meets quality and technical requirements.
  • Confirm that all installations and configurations comply with the specifications stated in the quotation or work order.
  • Document commissioning activities and provide reports to relevant stakeholders.

Attend to Customer’s Complaints On-site

  • Respond promptly to service calls and troubleshoot system issues on-site.
  • Diagnose, repair, and test faulty equipment or system components.
  • Provide technical support and advice to customers to resolve issues efficiently.
  • Liaise with internal teams and suppliers for parts replacement or technical escalation when required.
  • Ensure customer satisfaction through professional communication and quality service delivery.


Job Requirements:

  • Possess minimum Nitec / Diploma in Electrical / Electronic / Mechatronic Engineering or related field.
  • Experience in Intruder Alarm, CCTV and Access control systems or similar low-voltage systems preferred.


Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume


  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


LIONG ZHAO GUAN (R22107632)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
